name: Obducat AB (publ)
summary: Obducat AB (publ) develops and supplies lithography solutions for the use in the production and replication of micro and nanostructures worldwide. It offers SINDRE, a Nano imprint lithography system for industrial production; EITRE, a Nano imprint lithography for research and development purposes; and wet processing systems. The company also provides installation and support services. Its products are used in various applications, such as light emitting diodes (LEDs) and organic LEDs, optical components, MEMS, NEMS, PZT, hard disk drives, displays, photovoltaics, and medical devices. Obducat AB (publ) was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Lund, Sweden.
